subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come from the horizon of power is verily the Hidden Secret and the Treasured Mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من افق الاقتدار انه هو السر المکنون و المستسر المخزون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
